response.text:
The scope is in eye/jitter analysis mode on Ref 1.

- Main display: Eye Diagram (Meas 1)
  - Open eye centered near 0 V
  - Data rate about 2.501 Gb/s
  - Midlevel about 80.357 mV
  - Eye width shown as 3341/4995 UIs
  - Visible crossing spread and some vertical noise

- Left analysis panes:
  - Plot 3: TIE Histogram with a strong cluster on the positive side
  - Plot 2: TIE Spectrum with several narrow spurs
  - Plot 4: Bathtub curve spanning BER down to very low levels

- Lower center:
  - Waveform View of Ref 1
  - Dense gray waveform band roughly from about -600 mV to +500 mV
  - Orange markers/threshold indicators are visible

- Measurement results on the right:
  - Meas 1: Jitter Summary
    - DR: 2.501 Gb/s
    - PL(UI): 40
    - TIE(σ): 8.681 ps
    - TJ@: 54.07 ps
    - RJ: 1.680 ps
    - DJ: 33.75 ps
    - DCD: 2.288 ps
    - EW: 345.9 ps
  - Meas 2: Period
    - mean 1.066 ns
  - Meas 3: Frequency
    - mean 1.106 GHz
  - Meas 4: Positive Overshoot
    - mean 6.380%

So the positive overshoot measurement is present and reading about 6.38%.
